description: Simple XOR encryption hiding credential theft payload

expected_detections.name: Simple XOR Encryption
expected_detections.description: Detects single-byte XOR encryption used to obfuscate malicious payloads
indicators: bytes([b ^ key for b in data]) XOR pattern

expected_detections.name: Data Exfiltration via HTTP
expected_detections.description: Underlying threat: sending data to external server
indicators: Sending credential data in POST body

expected_detections.name: Dynamic Command Execution
expected_detections.description: Underlying threat: os.system with decrypted command
indicators: Decrypted payload passed to system call

expected_detections.name: Import-Time Execution
expected_detections.description: Code executes automatically when module is imported

obfuscation_technique.purpose: Hide credential theft command in encrypted bytes

deobfuscated_threat: Steals AWS credentials and exfiltrates to attacker-controlled server
